title: Apocalyptic Mod
description: Adds more zombies and living creatures that are hostile, and adds more tools to fight with!
body:
**The Apocalyptic Mod**
The Apocalyptic Mod adds more creatures (living entities, zombies and such) to the game that are mostly hostile and infected, the mod also adds more tools like the blade which can be made out of all basic materials like every other vanilla tool. The new blades that are added to the game are a better option than a sword as they are stronger and better, deal more damage and have more durability than your classic sword.
The mod makes the game harder with the hordes that are spawning, but makes it even easier with the new tools you can use to take them down or any other mob.
